name: slides
description: Create and convert slide decks. Accepts MARP markdown or Typst as input; outputs PDF, HTML, PPTX, and Google Slides with visual validation. Typst → PPTX uses an image-per-slide pipeline (pixel-faithful, non-editable). Ships two diagram-authoring skills: drawio (informal overlapping-shape sketches) and typst-diagram (publication-quality figures with uniform-gap Venn layouts and triadic palette).
